title: stelis valvulosa
intro: Stelis valvulosa, also known as the Orchid Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine and has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis valvulosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis valvulosa often involve drying the plant's roots and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
